name: Cheese Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the cheese.
2. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients until well combined.
3. Chill the mixture for about 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. Divide the mixture into thirds and roll each portion in paprika.
5. Wrap each rolled log tightly in plastic wrap or place in freezer bags.
6. Store in the freezer for up to 2 months.
